name: Chunky Triple-Chocolate Cookies
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 325°F. Grease three cookie sheets.
Melt chocolate with butter in a double boiler over simmering water. Cool.
Beat eggs and sugar in a mixer bowl until ribbon forms when beaters are lifted,
about 10 minutes. Beat in melted chocolate mixture and vanilla extract.
Combine flour, baking powder, and salt in a separate bowl.
Stir into the chocolate mixture just until combined (do not overmix). Stir in
chocolate chips and chopped nuts.
Drop batter by teaspoonfuls about 2 inches apart onto cookie sheets. Bake for
7-8 minutes, or until barely firm and tops are slightly cracked. Cool on cookie
sheets for 2 minutes, then transfer to wire racks. Dip one side of cooled cookies
in melted chocolate. For serving ideas, drizzle the tops with melted chocolate
instead of dipping.
